Create a new Retell LLM Response Engine that can be attached to an agent. This is used to generate response output for the agent.

Start an outbound SMS chat conversation with a phone number using the specified agent. The agent must be configured for chat mode. The initial SMS message will be automatically generated and sent based on the agent's configuration.

params.name: limit
params.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 1000, and the default is 1000.

params.name: pagination_key
params.description: The pagination key to continue fetching the next page of agents. Pagination key is represented by a agent id, pagination key and version pair is exclusive (not included in the fetched page). If not set, will start from the beginning.

params.name: pagination_key_version
params.description: Specifies the version of the agent associated with the pagination_key. When paginating, both the pagination_key and its version must be provided to ensure consistent ordering and to fetch the next page correctly.

params.name: is_latest
params.description: If true, only return the latest version of each agent.

items.docs: List all agents

params.name: limit
params.description: A limit on the number of objects to be returned. Limit can range between 1 and 1000, and the default is 1000.

params.name: pagination_key
params.description: The pagination key to continue fetching the next page of agents. Pagination key is represented by a agent id, pagination key and version pair is exclusive (not included in the fetched page). If not set, will start from the beginning.

params.name: pagination_key_version
params.description: Specifies the version of the agent associated with the pagination_key. When paginating, both the pagination_key and its version must be provided to ensure consistent ordering and to fetch the next page correctly.

params.name: is_latest
params.description: If true, only return the latest version of each chat agent.

items.docs: List all chat agents

params.name: sort_order
params.description: The chats will be sorted by `start_timestamp`, whether to return the chats in ascending or descending order.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of chats returned. Default 50, Max 1000. To retrieve more than 1000, use pagination_key to continue fetching the next page.

params.name: pagination_key
params.description: The pagination key to continue fetching the next page of chats. Pagination key is represented by a chat id here, and it's exclusive (not included in the fetched chats). The last chat id from the list chats is usually used as pagination key here. If not set, will start from the beginning.

items.docs: List all chats

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of conversation flows returned. Default 1000, Max 1000. To retrieve more than 1000, use pagination_key to continue fetching the next page.

params.name: pagination_key
params.description: The pagination key to continue fetching the next page of conversation flows. Pagination key is represented by a conversation flow id here, and it's exclusive (not included in the fetched conversation flows). The last conversation flow id from the list conversation flows is usually used as pagination key here. If not set, will start from the beginning.

params.name: pagination_key_version
params.description: Specifies the version of the conversation flow associated with the pagination_key. When paginating, both the pagination_key and its version must be provided to ensure consistent ordering and to fetch the next page correctly.
